_source: YouTube Creator Academy, TikTok Business Center, Meta Business Help, Sprout Social 2026
_note: Long-tail platform data. Specific specs, algorithm factors, and optimization tactics.

video_specs.recommended_codec: H.264 or H.265 for upload; YouTube re-encodes anyway

algorithm_factors_ranked.target: Total minutes watched across all viewers

algorithm_factors_ranked.description: Do viewers watch more YouTube after your video?
Does your video start a YouTube session?

thumbnail_optimization.human_face_rule: Thumbnails with faces get 38% higher CTR (YouTube internal study)
thumbnail_optimization.contrast_rule: High contrast; readable at 180px wide (suggested video size)
thumbnail_optimization.text_rule: Max 6 words; 90pt+ font; bold; outline or drop shadow for readability
thumbnail_optimization.color_rule: Avoid YouTube red/white — blends with interface; use blue, green, orange, yellow
thumbnail_optimization.a_b_testing: YouTube Studio allows title/thumbnail testing; test after first 500 impressions

patterns_that_work: I Tried [Thing] for [Time] — Here's What Happened

upload_timing.caveat: Analyze YOUR audience analytics; generic advice may not apply

retention_engineering.0_30_seconds: Hook: State the promise + why viewer should watch to end
retention_engineering.30_90_seconds: Establish credibility + expand on the hook
retention_engineering.pattern_interrupts: Change of scene, graphic, music, tone every 60-90 seconds
retention_engineering.loop_open_loops: State a question early, answer it late; creates psychological need to watch through

monetization_thresholds.adsense: 1,000 subscribers + 4,000 watch hours (12 months) OR 10M Shorts views

video_specs.duration: 15s to 10 minutes; 60-90s sweet spot for most content
video_specs.audio: Must have audio; captions + music dramatically boost completion

algorithm_factors.completion_rate: Most weighted signal; 100% completion much preferred
algorithm_factors.rewatch_rate: Watched multiple times = very high signal
algorithm_factors.shares: Most valuable engagement; signals strong content
algorithm_factors.comments: Especially questions that creator responds to
algorithm_factors.early_exit: User swipes away in <3s = strong negative signal (punishes bad hooks)

for_you_page_mechanics.initial_test_pool: Video shown to 200-300 accounts; if engagement rate >X → next pool
for_you_page_mechanics.niche_hashtags: Smaller, specific communities get content shown to interested users first
for_you_page_mechanics.trending_audio: Using trending sounds boosts initial distribution

hook_principles.first_3_seconds: Must stop scroll; pattern interrupt; question or claim
hook_principles.on_screen_text: Show first message in first 0-1 second; reader wants to know before committing
hook_types: Controversy: 'This is why [common advice] is wrong'
Story: 'Two years ago I was [problem]; now [transformation]'
Stakes: 'If you [situation], watch this before you [action]'

reels.algorithm_note: Watch time and shares weighted highest; Reels pushed heavily in 2025-2026

feed_posts.dimensions: 1080x1350 portrait (4:5) gets most real estate; 1080x1080 square
feed_posts.carousel: Up to 10 slides; algorithm pushes because multiple swipes = higher engagement time

niche_selection.right_level: 'Python automation for accountants' — clear audience, underserved
niche_selection.monetization_check: Can audience spend money on: courses, tools, services, products?

content_pillars.definition: 3-5 core topics that define your channel; rotate between them
content_pillars.example: Finance channel: [Stock picks] [Economic analysis] [Investing mistakes] [Book reviews] [Portfolio updates]
content_pillars.benefit: Algorithm learns what your channel is about; subscribers know what to expect

open_loop_examples: Start: 'Before I tell you the #1 way to [X], let me tell you the mistake everyone makes first'
Start: 'By the end of this video, you'll know exactly why [surprising fact]'
hooks_and_retention.callbacks: Reference earlier content in later videos; rewards long-time viewers
hooks_and_retention.cliffhangers: End video with preview of next part; increases subscriber notification open rate
